title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§113.  Budget to include additional salary

The police juries of each of said parishes shall annually, at the time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount to pay the salary herein fixed.  

Added by Acts 1950, No. 148, §3.
